section_title: Certain provisions of Chapter II to apply to conductor’s license
chapter_title: Licensing of Conductors of Stage Carriages
text: The provisions of sub-section (2) of section 6, sections 14, 15 and 23, sub-section (1) of section 24 and section 25 shall, so far as may be, apply in relation to a conductor’s license, as they apply in relation to a driving license.
